name: Heizou/ secret diary (College AU)
description:
To find his dairy written since high school’s second year. (IDK, just from the second year K?)

Something I made during my holiday in the note pad. Made some improvement, may suck. Don’t mind it K? And to tell you my holiday was bad. I’m never leaving my country, na, my city any more. Until I feels like it

there are two messages, the first is open ended, and the second on is rather ykyk, Heizou stalker stuff
creator: Dale-Cliff
